assertions.description: TVS1800DRV (U301, U302) from Power_Protection library not detected as protection devices -- only discrete D-prefix TVS diodes detected
ECMF02-2AMX6 (U108) USB ESD/CM filter not in protection_devices, usb_data reports has_esd_protection=false despite U108 on those nets
REVIEW: TLV75733PDRV LDOs (U305, U505) marked as inverting=true -- TLV757xx is a standard positive fixed-output LDO
